summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Loyalty Metrics Dashboard feature. All backend API tests (10/10) passed and frontend UI tests passed. The metrics endpoint returns summary, loyalty, product_revenue, product_repeat, sequence_effectiveness, and top_buyers data. The Metricas tab is the default tab on the LoyaltyPage with 6 KPI cards, charts, and loyalty summary cards all rendering correctly.
passed_tests: Metrics response contains 'summary' with all required fields (total_clients, repeat_rate, retention_rate, total_revenue, avg_order_value, avg_purchases_per_client)
Metrics response contains 'loyalty' section with enrollments and message stats
Metrics response contains 'product_revenue' array with correct structure
Metrics response contains 'product_repeat' array with repeat rate per product
Metrics response contains 'top_buyers' array sorted by total_spent
Metrics data verified: Maria Garcia $111.90, Ana Martinez $13.25
Frontend: Metricas tab is default/active tab on LoyaltyPage
Frontend: 6 KPI cards displayed (Clientes, Recompra, Retencion, Revenue Total, Ticket Promedio, Compras/Cliente)
Frontend: Revenue por Producto bar chart visible with Recharts
Frontend: Retencion de Clientes donut chart showing 100% retention
Frontend: Tasa de Recompra por Producto progress bars displayed
Frontend: Efectividad de Secuencias cards with completion and delivery rates
Frontend: Top Compradores table showing ranked buyers
Frontend: 3 loyalty summary cards at bottom (Inscripciones Lealtad, Mensajes Totales, Tasa de Entrega)
Tab navigation works: Metricas -> Secuencias -> Inscripciones -> Metricas
seed_data_creation: None - used existing sample data: 2 clients with purchases (Maria Garcia $111.90, Ana Martinez $13.25), 3 loyalty enrollments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loyalty Metrics Dashboard fully implemented. The GET /api/loyalty/metrics endpoint uses MongoDB aggregation pipelines to calculate metrics on-the-fly from leads and enrollments collections. The Metricas tab is now the default tab on the Fidelizacion page. Recharts library is used for bar and pie charts. Sample data shows 2 clients with purchases and 3 active enrollments in Bombro loyalty sequence.
